telegramText: MARKET WRAP — Mar 19, 2026 Markets reflected stagflationary pressures as risk assets struggled despite crypto resilience, with Bitcoin holding above $70K while traditional equity indices lagged. The elevated VIX at 24 and flat bond performance in TLT suggest investors are grappling with persistent inflation concerns amid slowing growth dynamics.
